discussion_comments.comment_body: These env variables are unnecessary since they are duplicated with `.env`.

Looks bad. This file is already in docker image

Dockerfile:203 
```
COPY docker/service_conf.yaml.template ./conf/service_conf.yaml.template
```

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/da201534-1d17-43a3-8aa2-192fcb5e4b0b)

The OSS configurations and subsequent settings in the image files are commented out (prefixed with #), resulting in the rendered configurations also being commented. To make them effective, rebuilding the image would be required, which is time-consuming. Therefore, it's more efficient to mount the configuration files via volumes instead of embedding them in the image.

commented_code:
-# The RAGFlow team do not actively maintain docker-compose-CN-oc9.yml, so use them at your own risk. 
-# However, you are welcome to file a pull request to improve it.
-include:
-  - ./docker-compose-base.yml
-
-services:
-  ragflow:
-    depends_on:
-      mysql:
-        condition: service_healthy
-    image: edwardelric233/ragflow:oc9
-    container_name: ragflow-server
-    ports:
-      - ${SVR_HTTP_PORT}:9380
-      - 80:80
-      - 443:443
-    volumes:
-      - ./ragflow-logs:/ragflow/logs
-      - ./nginx/ragflow.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/ragflow.conf
-      - ./nginx/proxy.conf:/etc/nginx/proxy.conf
-      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
-    env_file: .env
-    environment:
-      - TZ=${TIMEZONE}
-      - HF_ENDPOINT=${HF_ENDPOINT}
-      - MACOS=${MACOS}
-    networks:
-      - ragflow
-    restart: on-failure
-    # https://docs.docker.com/engine/daemon/prometheus/#create-a-prometheus-configuration
-    # If you're using Docker Desktop, the --add-host flag is optional. This flag makes sure that the host's internal IP gets exposed to the Prometheus container.
-    extra_hosts:
-      - "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"
+# The RAGFlow team do not actively maintain docker-compose-CN-oc9.yml, so use them at your own risk. 
+# However, you are welcome to file a pull request to improve it.
+include:
+  - ./docker-compose-base.yml
+
+services:
+  ragflow:
+    depends_on:
+      mysql:
+        condition: service_healthy
+    image: edwardelric233/ragflow:oc9
+    container_name: ragflow-server
+    ports:
+      - ${SVR_HTTP_PORT}:9380
+      - 80:80
+      - 443:443
+    volumes:
+      - ./ragflow-logs:/ragflow/logs
+      - ./nginx/ragflow.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/ragflow.conf
+      - ./nginx/proxy.conf:/etc/nginx/proxy.conf
+      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
+    env_file: .env
+    environment:
+      - TZ=${TIMEZONE}
+      - HF_ENDPOINT=${HF_ENDPOINT}
+      - MACOS=${MACOS}
+      - isRegisterEnabled=${isRegisterEnabled}

discussion_comments.comment_body:
`env_file: .env`
This makes all the variables in `.env` accessible. So, alteration is not necessary for all the compose files.
